releases.description:
# [2.0.0](https://github.com/dbrockman/obsidian-change-case/compare/1.1.0...2.0.0) (2023-10-13)


### Features

* support non-Latin alphabets ([5cb0a47](https://github.com/dbrockman/obsidian-change-case/commit/5cb0a474c00af96e1d5dd46edb0dae5e1cdbe951))


### BREAKING CHANGES

* Rename `Change Case: param-case` to `Change Case: kebab-case`.
* Rename `Change Case: Header-Case` to `Change Case: Train-Case`.
